prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次依次约6602→6455→5910→5662→5702，整体呈明显上升趋势（位次数字减小=竞争加剧），近4年累计前移约900名；2025年基准约5702名，较2024年微降40名，基本企稳；本省理科/物理类计划2021年1006人→2022年962人→2023年969人→2024年971人→2025年940人，呈小幅缩减趋势；2026年计划1069人，较2025年大幅扩招约129人（+13.7%），扩招幅度显著，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第39名，近年排名稳定在38–41区间，属于全国顶尖理工类院校，综合实力强劲；2026年高考周期声誉数据中无该校明显负面事件，声誉信号中性；抖音热度排名第60位（较热），短视频曝光量一般，无明显报考关注度异常信号；历史投档异常记录缺失，；信息与通信工程A+、电子科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A、网络空间安全A、机械工程A-，共5个A-及以上学科，在电子信息与计算机领域实力突出，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业2024年评估为“高热推荐”，计算机类为“推荐”，相关专业社会热度持续高位；陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约34032人（+19.7%），考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；西安电子科技大学位于陕西省西安市，为本省高校，对本省考生有天然地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5702名、2026年大幅扩招（+13.7%）缓解竞争、本省考生大幅增加（+19.7%）加剧竞争、学校层次高且专业热度持续高位等因素，扩招与考生增加相互对冲后竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约6201名，区间5701–6701名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术（国家拔尖基地班）
- 电子信息类（卓越计划实验班）（通信工程卓越班等）
- 人工智能（图灵实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（通信）（通信工程、信息工程等）

- 计算机类（智能）（人工智能、智能科学与技术）
- 自动化类（智能制造及智能测控）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间5701–6701名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<5701名）可重点冲击一档实验班/卓越班；位次接近区间上限（>6701名）建议以三档为主、二档为辅。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 6602 → 6455 → 5910 → 5662 → 5702, showing a clear upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers indicate intensified competition), with a cumulative improvement of about 900 places over the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 5702, a slight decrease of 40 from 2024, basically stable; provincial Science/Physics Category enrollment plans: 1006 in 2021 → 962 in 2022 → 969 in 2023 → 971 in 2024 → 940 in 2025, showing a slight reduction trend; the 2026 plan is 1069, a significant expansion of about 129 places (+13.7%) compared to 2025, which will somewhat alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 39th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the 38–41 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier science and engineering institutions in China with strong comprehensive strength; no significant negative events related to the university in the 2026 college entrance examination cycle reputation data, with a neutral reputation signal; Douyin popularity ranking 60th (relatively popular), short video exposure average, no abnormal attention signals for admissions; no historical abnormal admission records; Information and Communication Engineering A+, Electronic Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Cyberspace Security A, Mechanical Engineering A-, a total of 5 disciplines rated A- or above, with outstanding strength in electronic information and computer fields, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors were rated as 'highly recommended' in 2024, Computer Science as 'recommended', with related majors maintaining high social popularity; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shaanxi Province is about 206,500, an increase of about 34,032 (+19.7%) from 172,468 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition; Xidian University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, a local university with natural regional appeal to local candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5702, the significant expansion in 2026 (+13.7%) easing competition, the substantial increase in local candidates (+19.7%) intensifying competition, the high university level, and sustained high popularity of majors, the expansion and candidate increase offset each other with slightly intensified competition; the predicted minimum ranking is about 6201, with a range of 5701–6701.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology (National Top Talent Base Class)
- Electronic Information (Excellence Program Experimental Class) (Communication Engineering Excellence Class, etc.)
- Artificial Intelligence (Turing Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (Communication) (Communication Engineering, Information Engineering, etc.)
- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuits) (Microelectronics Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Computer Science (Intelligence) (Artificial Intelligence, Intelligent Science and Technology)
- Automation (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Measurement and Control).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Science, Information Physics, Aerospace Information)
- Computer Science (Cybersecurity) (Information Security, Cyberspace Security)
- Materials (Electronic Materials and Micro-Nano Devices)
- Management Science and Engineering (Digital and Business Intelligence Integrated Training).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 5701–6701, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<5701), focus on Tier 1 experimental/excellence classes; for rankings near the upper limit (>6701), prioritize Tier 3 majors supplemented by Tier 2.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2743名、2026年小幅扩招（+2.4%）、本省历史类考生大幅增加（+17.0%）、文科专业热度一般等因素，考生增加带来的竞争加剧效应远大于扩招缓解效应；预测最低位次约2802名，区间2382–3222名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 2689 → 2800 → 2601 → 2828 → 2743, fluctuating narrowly within the 2600–2830 range with no clear trend; the 2025 baseline is about 2743rd place; provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plans: 80 in 2021 → 84 in 2022 → 84 in 2023 → 77 in 2024 → 84 in 2025, basically stable around 80; the 2026 plan is 86, a slight expansion of 2 (+2.4%) compared to 2025, with minimal impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 39th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with strong overall strength, but the university is primarily focused on science and engineering, with a small-scale liberal arts program; no significant negative events for the university in the 2026 college entrance examination cycle reputation data, with a neutral reputation signal; Douyin popularity ranking 60th (relatively hot), with moderate application attention; its liberal arts majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literatures, Business Administration) have no corresponding A-class disciplines, with advantageous disciplines concentrated in electronic information and computer fields, and relatively weak disciplinary support for liberal arts programs.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language and Literature was rated 'Recommended' in 2024, Foreign Languages and Literatures as 'Generally Wait-and-See', and Business Administration as 'Clearly Discouraged', with overall social popularity of liberal arts majors being average; in 2026, Shaanxi Province has about 88,500 history category examinees, an increase of approximately 12,859 (+17.0%) from 75,641 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition; Xidian University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, a local university with some regional appeal for local liberal arts examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2743rd, slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+2.4%), a significant increase in provincial history category examinees (+17.0%), and average popularity of liberal arts majors, the intensifying effect of increased competition far outweighs the mitigating effect of enrollment expansion; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2802nd, with a range of 2382–3222nd.

- Business Administration (Digital Enterprise Management and Digital Finance Integration Training) (Business Administration, Finance, Financial Management).
